name: token-efficient-agent-workshop
description: Workshop: measure and reduce the cost of a real coding agent solving a frontend task.

scripts.proxy:setup: cp apps/angular-demo/.mcp-proxy.json apps/angular-demo/.mcp.json && echo "✅ .mcp.json → proxy (localhost:9100). Edit servers/proxy/src/index.ts, then: npm run proxy:rebuild"
scripts.proxy:setup-codex: mkdir -p apps/angular-demo/.codex && cp workshop/proxy/codex.proxy.config.toml apps/angular-demo/.codex/config.toml && echo "✅ Codex MCP config → proxy (localhost:9100). Edit servers/proxy/src/index.ts, then: npm run proxy:rebuild"
scripts.proxy:direct-codex: mkdir -p apps/angular-demo/.codex && cp workshop/proxy/codex.direct.config.toml apps/angular-demo/.codex/config.toml && echo "✅ Codex MCP config → direct bloated MCP (localhost:9001..9005)"
scripts.proxy:solution: npm run proxy:setup && cp workshop/proxy/index.ts servers/proxy/src/index.ts && npm run proxy:rebuild && echo "✅ эталон applied + proxy rebuilt (compact). Now: npm run workshop:run3"
scripts.proxy:solution-codex: npm run proxy:setup-codex && cp workshop/proxy/index.codex.ts servers/proxy/src/index.ts && npm run proxy:rebuild && echo "✅ Codex proxy эталон applied + proxy rebuilt. Now: npm run workshop:run3-codex"
scripts.proxy:reset: git checkout apps/angular-demo/.mcp.json servers/proxy/src/index.ts && echo "✅ .mcp.json → direct + proxy → passthrough болванка (run: npm run proxy:rebuild)"
scripts.proxy:reset-codex: npm run proxy:direct-codex && git checkout -- servers/proxy/src/index.ts && echo "✅ Codex config → direct + proxy → passthrough болванка (run: npm run proxy:rebuild)"
scripts.hooks:setup-codex: mkdir -p apps/angular-demo/.codex/hooks && cp workshop/hooks/post-tool-use.codex.scaffold.ts apps/angular-demo/.codex/hooks/post-tool-use.ts && cp workshop/hooks/hooks.codex.json apps/angular-demo/.codex/hooks.json && echo "✅ Codex hook scaffold installed + registered. Edit apps/angular-demo/.codex/hooks/post-tool-use.ts, then: npm run workshop:run3-codex"
scripts.hooks:solution: git checkout apps/angular-demo/.mcp.json && npm run hooks:setup && cp workshop/hooks/post-tool-use.solution.ts apps/angular-demo/.claude/hooks/post-tool-use.ts && echo "✅ hooks эталон applied (.mcp.json=direct, hook registered). Now: npm run workshop:run3"
scripts.hooks:solution-codex: npm run proxy:direct-codex && npm run hooks:setup-codex && cp workshop/hooks/post-tool-use.codex.ts apps/angular-demo/.codex/hooks/post-tool-use.ts && echo "✅ Codex hooks эталон applied (.codex/config.toml=direct, hook registered). Now: npm run workshop:run3-codex"
scripts.hooks:reset-codex: mkdir -p apps/angular-demo/.codex/hooks && cp workshop/hooks/post-tool-use.codex.scaffold.ts apps/angular-demo/.codex/hooks/post-tool-use.ts && printf '{}\n' > apps/angular-demo/.codex/hooks.json && echo "✅ Codex hooks disabled + scaffold restored"
scripts.e2e:all: npm run e2e:hygiene && npm run e2e:proxy && npm run e2e:hooks && npm run e2e:hooks-codex && npm run e2e:hooks-cursor
scripts.setup:
[ ! -f .env ] && cp .env.example .env && echo "Created .env from .env.example" || true; npm run setup:docker && npm run setup:mcp && npm run setup:trust && echo "
✅ Workshop ready. Pick your variant: npm run variant -- <1|2|3>"
scripts.cleanup:
npm run setup:mcp-cleanup && npm run setup:docker-cleanup && echo "
✅ Workshop cleanup complete."
